title: Dad's Papers (October 2022)
html: Stub. A loose set of misaligned, hand-written papers Dad gave Yahir during the October 14/15 2022 visit — described as "the story of your dad." Yahir partially burned them in a backyard fire as ritual closure, but secretly salvaged the un-burned half to read later. They contain the "mi engaño" backstory, the 2008 house-loss, Dad's love-since-13 origin story with Mom, and his religious-repulsion arc.
